q1.question: What is TMMT?
q1.answer: TMMT is a 100% digital platform that streamlines UAE visa and government services. We connect you with licensed PRO officers to handle residence visas, Emirates ID, medical tests, family visas, and business setup — all from the comfort of your home.

q2.question: How does TMMT work?
q2.answer: Simply upload your documents, and our AI-powered system validates them instantly. Our licensed officers handle all government submissions, appointments, and follow-ups. Track everything in real-time through your dashboard.

q3.question: What services does TMMT offer?
q3.answer: We offer comprehensive UAE services including: Residence Visas, Family Visas, Emirates ID, Medical Screening, Golden Visa, Business Setup, Trade License Renewals, Employee Visa Management, and PRO Services.

q4.question: How long does the visa process take?
q4.answer: Processing times vary by service: Entry permits take 1-3 days, Residence visas 5-7 days, Emirates ID 3-5 days. Our priority processing can reduce these times by up to 50%.

q5.question: Is my data secure with TMMT?
q5.answer: Absolutely. We use bank-level encryption and are compliant with UAE data protection regulations. Your documents are stored securely and never shared without your consent.

q6.question: What are the fees?
q6.answer: Our fees are transparent with no hidden charges. Service fees vary by complexity — you can view detailed pricing on our pricing page. Government fees are separate and paid directly.
